# Common Domain — Architecture Decision Records

Cross-cutting software design principles informed by Ousterhout's A Philosophy of Software Design. Technology-agnostic guidance on module depth, complexity management, error design, and abstraction layering. Distinct from Cherry's crate-specific architecture decisions.

Governed by [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md).
